calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-29-2004 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-18-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Marta Guzman, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Bank of America, N.A. (U.S.A.)
After hearing the evidence presented and declarations in file, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: David T. Nguyen as follows:
Principal $26,826.55
Interest $3,197.25
No Attorney's Fees.
Costs $317.50 for a total of $30,341.30
Judgment signed in open court.
